compressed_prompt: Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula no commas
response:
The morning light on a quiet hill
A single bird with a song to fill
The space between two distant shores
And the echo of forgotten wars

A river runs through the sleeping land
Divided by a line in the sand
The same sky watches from above
With eyes of patience eyes of love

We are one people under the sun
Our story has only just begun
Though walls may stand and years may pass
The truth is written in the grass

The wind it whispers through the pine
A melody on a fragile line
It does not know of north or south
Just the turning of the seasons mouth

We are one people under the sun
Our story has only just begun
Though walls may stand and years may pass
The truth is written in the grass

A dream of hands that reach so far
To touch a single shining star
To build a bridge across the night
And make the future warm and bright

We are one people under the sun
Our story has only just begun
Though walls may stand and years may pass
The truth is written in the grass
The truth is waiting in the grass
